summary: Indian-Canadian Parsi author. Known for A Fine Balance (set during the Emergency), Such a Long Journey, Tales from Firozsha Baag.

works.name: A Fine Balance
works.description: Novel set during Indira Gandhi's Emergency about Dina, tailors Ishvar and Om, and student Maneck.

clues.clue: Set during the Emergency; Ishvar and Om are Dalit tailors; Dina; Maneck Kohlah
examples: Dina Dalal forges an inseparable relationship with the Darji tailors

clues.clue: Ishvar loses legs, Om is castrated for disrespecting an upper-class gangster
examples: the untouchable Ishvar has his legs amputated and his nephew Om is castrated

clues.clue: Helicopter causes giant cutout of leader to topple on civilians
examples: a helicopter causes a giant cutout of a leader to topple on civilians

works.name: Such a Long Journey
works.description: Set in 1971 Bombay during Bangladesh war. Gustad Noble involved in money laundering.

clues.clue: Gustad Noble; Jimmy Bilimoria's money laundering scheme; 1971 Bangladesh war
examples: Gustad Noble in his novel Such A Long Journey
takes part in a money laundering scheme for his friend Jimmy Bilimoria

clues.clue: Withdrawn from University of Mumbai syllabus after Thackeray complaint
examples: withdrawn from a syllabus at University of Mumbai when Bal Thackeray's grandson complained

clues.clue: 'Squatter' — man returns home because he can't use Canadian toilets
examples: Dr. No-Ilaaz is unable to help the title character who... cannot use Canadian toilets

clues.clue: 'Auspicious Occasion' — Behram Roje celebration; tobacco spit stains clean outfit
examples: his clean outfit stained by tobacco spit

comprehensive_summary: Rohinton Mistry is an Indian-Canadian Parsi author. A Fine Balance is set during India's Emergency and follows Dina, tailors Ishvar and Om, and Maneck. Such a Long Journey follows Gustad Noble in 1971 Bombay. Tales from Firozsha Baag includes stories like 'Squatter.'

cards.front: Novel: Dina, Dalit tailors Ishvar and Om, and student Maneck
Novel: Ishvar loses legs, Om is castrated
Novel: Gustad Noble in 1971 Bombay; money laundering scheme with Jimmy Bilimoria during Bangladesh war
